payload.note: The organization 'Global Marine Services LLC' was flagged during onboarding due to overlap with 'Global Marine Service Co', classified as an SDN entity in Iran. The discrepancies include country mismatch (US vs IR), potential date of birth conflict, and identifier contradictions. Though there's organization type alignment and token overlap evidence, insufficient corroboration necessitates further analyst investigation prior to closure.
evidence_summary: Organization name overlap ('Global Marine') with matched entity (Global Marine Service Co)
Country mismatch in screened party (US) versus matched party (IR)
Date of birth mismatch or absence between screened and matched parties
Identifier conflict present as no exact match in registration numbers or tax IDs
missing_information_summary: Lack of corroboration for date of birth
Need for additional investigation due to contradictory evidence
payload.next_step_rationale: Investigate the contradictions and gather more supporting information.
